creator: devosalain@ymail.com
text:
Building math ginac ends with :

[00:00:03] => ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
[00:00:03] => Attempting to fetch ftp://ftpthep.physik.uni-mainz.de/pub/GiNaC/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2
[00:00:03] fetch: ftp://ftpthep.physik.uni-mainz.de/pub/GiNaC/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2: No address record
[00:00:03] => Attempting to fetch http://www.ginac.de/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2
[00:00:04] fetch: http://www.ginac.de/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2: Not Found
[00:00:04] => Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2
[00:00:04] fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/ginac-1.8.1.tar.bz2: Not Found
[00:00:04] => Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
[00:00:04] => port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
[00:00:04] *** Error code 1
